title: A Taxonomy of Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) Applications

defines.name: RAG taxonomy
defines.definition: A taxonomy that conceptualizes and categorizes the core characteristics of retrieval-augmented generation applications across domains.

uses: Nickerson et al. taxonomy creation method
problem: There is a lack of a holistic, application-oriented taxonomy for retrieval-augmented generation that systematically captures its characteristics across domains.
